If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Design Director
description:
**Are you passionate about creating exceptional user experiences while inspiring a talented creative team to thrive?**
 We are looking for a
 **Design Director** 
 who balances strategic design vision with empowering team management and a pragmatic, execution-focused mindset. We have a bold ambition to be the undisputed #1 service in the eyes of our consumers. To get there, we need a leader who has successfully built and elevated design practices before—someone who knows what "great" looks like, both in the final user experience and in the best-in-class ways of working that get us there.
   

  

 You will play a fundamental role in translating our consumer-centric strategy and ambition into world-class design execution that drives real user, business, and brand impact.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 As the Design Director at Instabee, your mission is to embed user-centricity into our cross-functional initiatives and workflows, implement insights-driven design practices, and lead and develop our team of product and brand designers. You will collaborate closely with colleagues and stakeholders in strategy, product, analytics, tech, and operations. Together with your peers in Consumer, you will establish consumer ambassadorship and center of excellence - ensuring the consumer experience is top-of-mind in everything we do.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities Fall Into Three Key Pillars**
* Drive Design Strategy & Transformation
* Develop and continuously hone the design practices at Instabee to achieve our high consumer experience ambitions, desired brand position, user-centricity, efficiency, and business outcomes.
* Champion the end-to-end user perspective across all development phases, from discovery and design execution to post-launch optimization.
* Demonstrate the value of great design for our user experience and business goals, building trust, credibility and the strong internal relationships needed to give design a strong voice in company decisions.
* Ensure our design organization stays on the forefront of the craft: exploring and putting emerging methodologies and technologies into practice.
* Lead and Empower the Design Team
* Recruit, coach, develop, and lead a high-performing, multidisciplinary team of product and brand designers working with teams and stakeholders across the organization.
* Oversee brand and product design for Growth, Operations, Markets, and other key teams. Translate strategic business objectives and priorities into clear design strategy, adapting resources and capabilities to effectively support the organization and focus where it matters most.
* Champion high standards for design execution. Ensure design output is cohesive, high-quality, and clearly connected to user and business goals.
* Deliver Senior Design Excellence
* Keep one foot in the craft, driving own high-impact product and UX/UI design work - leading by example and showcasing best practices.
* Raise the bar for design and design processes across digital, physical and human interactions, ensuring we deliver "brilliant basics" enhanced by targeted signature “wow moments” that differentiate us.
* Act as a strong facilitator bringing cross-functional experts together to solve complex consumer challenges and drive user-centric innovation.


**Your Profile**
* 8+ years of experience in senior consumer-focused design or product UX/UI roles within a fast-paced service, product, or tech environment.
* A proven track record of design execution that drives clear user, business, and brand impact.
* Solid experience building, leading and elevating multidisciplinary design teams. Skilled at unlocking the potential of different individuals and design disciplines.
* A working-leader mindset, with a passion for keeping your own senior design craft sharp and a desire to lead by example.
* Strong change management capabilities, with a history of successfully integrating design best practices into cross-functional work and influencing without formal ownership.
* A systems-thinking approach, allowing you to see the full customer journey across touchpoints while seamlessly moving between high-level strategic alignment and hands-on operational details.
* Great communication, facilitation and leadership skills, enabling you to build trust, inspire teams, and confidently navigate complex cross-organizational environments as a strong voice for the consumer and the business value of design.


**What You’ll Get**
 We can promise you that you will be challenged, develop your skills and have the opportunity to work with truly amazing and competent colleagues. If you like changes and want to set new processes and ways of working - this is the place for you!
   

  

**Benefits**
 Of course, we have all the necessary and standard benefits in place, but in addition to this, we can also offer:
   

  

* Sky-High Office: Modern and newly renovated with a 360-degree view around Stockholm.
* Puppy Friendly: Bring your dog to work - we've got a whole floor for our furry friends!
* Fun & Games: Ping pong, Shuffleboard, Foosball, and even a Karaoke Room for your leisure time.
* Parental Pay for Six Months: Step away from work and provide the best care and love to your little one.
* A Day Off on Your Birthday: We love to celebrate, so enjoy your birthday to the fullest with a day off each year!
* Hybrid setup and flexible working hours


**Get to know us**
 In 2022, Instabee was founded after combining Budbee and Instabox - two leading last-mile delivery companies with three consumer-facing brands: Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy. Instabee serves millions of consumers across Europe with convenient deliveries and is on track to become the leading European e-commerce enabler. Always with the consumer at heart.
   

  

 We’re fast, both in terms of parcel delivery and when it comes to growing our business. So far our journey has taken us from Sweden to the rest of Scandinavia and parts of continental Europe, but we have no plans on stopping anytime soon. As we continue to expand, the complexity of Instabee grows in parallel. With that in mind, we’re now looking for you to help us on the journey ahead.
   

  

*This recruitment process consists of background checks via Svensk Bakgrundsanalys as a review of previous public criminal records. The result is public information that is handled confidentially. This is mandatory for all recruitment processes at Instabee in Sweden.*
**Please note that, due to the summer holiday period, we will begin reviewing applications in August. We appreciate your patience and will be in touch with all candidates once the recruitment process resumes.**
 Instabee Group, with consumer-facing brands Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy, brings together years of experience in delivery. Today, Instabee Group is present in five markets, serving thousands of online merchants and millions of consumers with seamless home deliveries and convenient parcel locker deliveries, using the best fuel available. With smart technology, a strong focus on sustainability, and a secure supply chain, Instabee has become a trusted partner for online merchants and a preferred choice for consumers.

title: Design Director (visual/digital)
description:
Above is looking for a Design Director to join our creative team based in our Stockholm studio. This is a permanent full-time role.
   

  

**Job Description**
 As a Visual Design Director you will be a key player in driving cutting-edge design and innovation projects for some of the world’s most exciting brands. You will help us identify and secure new commercial opportunities, acting as a strategic partner for new and existing clients.
   

  

 With a high level of conceptual thinking, you will have a direct impact in shaping excellent project deliveries through craft and creativity, while also shaping our culture, team capabilities, and ways of working across disciplines.
   

  

 Our work is exciting and diverse in nature, spanning digital experiences such as websites, apps, and HMI. We collaborate across disciplines to create impact across all organizational levels and future horizons — from category-defining hero products to multidimensional digital ecosystems.
   

  

**What We Are Looking For**
 We are looking for an inspiring, forward-thinking Design Director who demonstrates excellence in craft, creativity, leadership, and emerging technologies:
   

  

* Forward-thinking approach to digital product experiences, with a keen interest in emerging trends and future developments
* Holistic thinker with strong conceptualization skills and critical-thinking abilities, comfortable leading conversations with stakeholders across design, technology, and business
* Demonstrated commercial experience in selling impactful digital experience projects — ideally supported by a strong professional network
* Strong storytelling and client leadership, with the ability to clearly communicate ideas and thought processes to both peers and clients
* Preferably 10+ years of professional experience, including familiarity with fast-paced agency environments and workflows
* Ability to lead, mentor, and grow multidisciplinary design teams, fostering creative excellence, psychological safety, and high performance
* Ability to lead clients through complex challenges and structure design processes that enable diverse teams to succeed
* Aesthetic sensibility in harmony with a thoughtful, user-centered approach to design, business, and technology
* Experience using — or actively driving — AI-enabled design workflows to explore ideas faster, prototype more intelligently, and elevate creative and strategic outcomes
* Ability to translate emerging AI capabilities into meaningful design direction, team practices, and client value
* A humble, self-propelled, and collaborative team player who feels at home in multi-competence project constellations


**A Bit About Above**
 We are a Scandinavian innovation agency dedicated to driving positive change through the integration of design, strategy, and technology. Our creative 360-approach allows us to break down boundaries between the physical and digital, while fusing hardware and software into meaningful experiences.
   

  

 We work with leading global brands, local Scandinavian heroes, and a fantastic collection of startups. We’re a team of warm, welcoming, dedicated professionals with diverse international backgrounds. In everything we do, we strive for world-class results and believe you share that mindset.
   

  

 Join a team that values collaboration, creativity, and tangible impact through thoughtful design.
   

  

**Join our team**
 Please submit your portfolio, CV, and personal letter.
   

  

 We welcome international applications and are generally able to assist with work permits and relocation.

title: Product Trainee Program
description:
**Product Trainee Program - Stockholm**
**Shape How Customers Discover And Experience Our Products.**
 Avarda's Product Trainee Program is an 18-month, learn-by-doing program for early-career talent who want to build a career in product. From day one you join a real team with a home domain and contribute to real work — supported by a dedicated mentor and structured exposure across our platform — with the possibility of growing into a junior Product Manager role.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
 Based in Stockholm, you'll join our Customer Acquisition & Experience track, working across the customer-facing surface — public web, checkout and post-purchase journeys. You'll build a deep understanding of how customers discover, apply for and interact with Avarda products, with a strong focus on conversion, onboarding flows, and the handoff between acquisition and servicing. Over the program you'll grow toward owning the requirements and roadmap input for a customer touchpoint end to end.
   

  

****Especially relevant for this track:****
* Results-driven, with a strong interest in customer acquisition, digital customer journeys and user experience.
* Passionate about customer-centric products that balance business growth, data insight and a seamless experience across the full lifecycle — onboarding, activation, engagement and retention.
* A collaborative, analytical team player who thrives in cross-functional settings with product, tech, design and commercial teams.


**Who You Are**
 We hire for mindset and potential, not ready-made expertise.
   

  

* You learn fast and stay curious — you want to understand the why, and you're comfortable when things are complex or evolving.
* You think critically — you weigh trade-offs and challenge ideas constructively rather than settling for the obvious answer.
* You take ownership — you drive things forward and follow through without being chased.
* You communicate clearly in English and collaborate easily across product, tech and business.
* You're a team player with low ego — happy to do what's needed, focused on outcomes over status.
* You're genuinely interested in digital products and how they create value for customers and the business.


**Nice to have**
* Some exposure to AI tools or AI-assisted workflows.
* A basic understanding of digital platforms, APIs or multi-sided markets.
* You're a recent graduate or early in your career. Studies in business or economics, technology or engineering, or product and innovation are all relevant — but mindset matters more than your degree subject.


**What We Offer**
* A structured 18-month program with a real role from day one.
* A home team and a dedicated mentor.
* Real ownership early — you deliver, you don't just observe.
* Structured cross-domain exposure across our product platform.
* A path to a permanent junior Product Manager role for strong performers.


**The details**
* Location: Stockholm.
* Duration: 18 months. Full time.
* Target start date: September 1, 2026.

title: Consumer Analyst
description:
Are you passionate about building true consumer preference—turning data and insights into real user and business impact?
   

  

 At Instabee, we are on a mission to become the undisputed #1 service in the eyes of our consumers. We are now looking for a Consumer Analyst to join our Consumer Department. In this role, you will play a fundamental part in building the analytical foundation and insights required to ensure our organization is aligned, informed, and accountable for delivering a superior consumer experience across all markets.
   

  

 This role is ideal for someone who combines strong analytical capabilities with business acumen and the ability to communicate findings clearly to diverse stakeholders.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As Consumer Analyst, you will translate complex data and consumer signals into clear, actionable insights that can drive strategic and tactical impact. Partnering with teams across Data & Analytics, Product, Design, Operations, Strategy and Market to understand challenges, synthesize insights from diverse sources, and co-create solutions grounded in consumer and business relevance.
   

  

 Your goal is to build a solid foundation for consumer, brand, and experience analytics, making insights accessible and actionable company-wide. Whether you are mapping the behavior of different consumer segments, uncovering what drives long-term retention, or tracking the impact of a new product feature, you will play a key role in guiding our journey toward becoming the undisputed #1 service in all our markets.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Manage the Consumer Scorecard: Define and evolve our core KPIs (NPS, User ratings, Brand preference, CSAT, MAU, Consumer base metrics, Operational metrics etc.) to ensure a trusted, single source of truth for our performance across the full consumer journey and lifecycle.
* Analyze Loyalty & Retention: Conduct cohort and retention analysis to identify the key drivers of consumer satisfaction and long-term loyalty. You’ll explore how different user segments behave and evolve, and translate user and service delivery insights into cross-functional guidance for the most effective ways to win, delight, and retain our consumers.
* Analyze Consumer Behavior: Dive deep into user behavior across web, app, communications and customer service channels. You will analyze funnels and identify drop-off points to provide concrete product and experience recommendations. This includes proactively identifying tracking gaps and defining what needs to be measured and how, to ensure decisions are grounded in reliable data.
* Translate Data into Action: Synthesize quantitative and qualitative data into concise, actionable insights. You will provide a holistic lens to ensure we deliver a seamless and superior experience across the entire consumer journey.
* Co-create Analytical Foundations: Partner with data and tech teams to ensure our data collection is high-quality, scalable, and reliable. You’ll help shape the tracking and data structures (e.g., GA4, BigQuery) required to turn digital behavior into trustworthy insights.
* Drive Performance Insights: Enable data-driven decision-making through forecasting, trend analysis, and the development of automated dashboards in Tableau, Steep or similar tools.
* Collaborative Problem Solving: Act as the consumer analytics partner for teams across Instabee, helping them move past the "what" to understand the "why" behind consumer behavior.
* Drive Experimentation: Design, run, and evaluate A/B tests—taking ownership from the initial hypothesis to the final conclusion and recommended next steps.


**Your profile**
 You are an analytical problem-solver with a natural drive to uncover patterns and understand exactly what drives consumer behavior and business performance. You are curious, proactive, and motivated by creating real-world results rather than theoretical perfection. You don't just provide data; you see it as your mission to provide the actionable insights that enable our teams to deliver a great consumer experience and our business to grow.
   

  

**Experience & Mindset**
* Analytical Experience: 4-5+ years of experience in consumer analytics, digital analytics or a related field - ideally within a fast-paced service or e-commerce environment.
* Commercial Curiosity: You have a strong business acumen and a natural drive to understand the "why" behind the numbers. You focus on what is relevant and actionable for the business, and proactively surface insights and opportunities.
* Problem Solver: Strong analytical and numerical skills with a business-oriented mindset. You excel at bringing structure to ambiguous problems and can navigate complex datasets to find the most impactful answers.
* Communication: You can translate complex analysis into sharp, actionable narratives for diverse stakeholders. You communicate insights clearly and confidently to stakeholders at all levels, from junior teams to senior leadership.
* Collaboration: Team player who enjoys working across Product, Tech, and Business teams to develop insights and build solutions together.
* Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, IT, Statistics, Business, or other relevant field.


**Analytical toolkit**
* Consumer Analytics: Proven ability to synthesize various internal and external consumer data into holistic consumer analytics and insights.
* Digital Analytics: Experience with tools such as Amplitude, GA4, or similar behavioral tracking platforms.
* Data Foundations: Proficiency in SQL and Python or similar, and experience working with large datasets.
* Visualization: Ability to build and maintain clear dashboards and funnels that give our teams an ongoing view of consumer health (e.g., using Tableau, Power BI, or Steep).
* AI coding tools: Experience in using AI tools in your analytical work is an advantage.
* Experimentation: Hands-on experience designing, running, and evaluating A/B tests is an advantage.
* Tracking: Knowledge of digital tracking implementation and Google Tag Manager is an advantage.


**What You'll Get**
 We can promise you that you will be challenged, develop your skills and have the opportunity to work with truly amazing and competent colleagues. If you like changes and want to set new processes and ways of working - this is the place for you!
   

  

**Benefits**
 Of course, we have all the necessary and standard benefits in place, but in addition to this, we can also offer:
   

  

* Sky-High Office: Modern and newly renovated with a 360-degree view around Stockholm.
* Puppy Friendly: Bring your dog to work - we've got a whole floor for our furry friends!
* Fun & Games: Ping pong, Shuffleboard, Foosball, and even a Karaoke Room for your leisure time.
* Parental Pay for Six Months: Step away from work and provide the best care and love to your little one.
* A Day Off on Your Birthday: We love to celebrate, so enjoy your birthday to the fullest with a day off each year!
* Hybrid setup and flexible working hours


**Get to know us**
 In 2022, Instabee was founded after combining Budbee and Instabox - two leading last-mile delivery companies with three consumer-facing brands: Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy. Instabee serves millions of consumers across Europe with convenient deliveries and is on track to become the leading European e-commerce enabler. Always with the consumer at heart.
   

  

 We’re fast, both in terms of parcel delivery and when it comes to growing our business. So far our journey has taken us from Sweden to the rest of Scandinavia and parts of continental Europe, but we have no plans on stopping anytime soon. As we continue to expand, the complexity of Instabee grows in parallel. With that in mind, we’re now looking for you to help us on the journey ahead.
   

  

*This recruitment process consists of background checks via Svensk Bakgrundsanalys as a review of previous public criminal records. The result is public information that is handled confidentially. This is mandatory for all recruitment processes at Instabee in Sweden.*
**Please note that, due to the summer holiday period, we will begin reviewing applications in August. We appreciate your patience and will be in touch with all candidates once the recruitment process resumes.**
 Instabee Group, with consumer-facing brands Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy, brings together years of experience in delivery. Today, Instabee Group is present in five markets, serving thousands of online merchants and millions of consumers with seamless home deliveries and convenient parcel locker deliveries, using the best fuel available. With smart technology, a strong focus on sustainability, and a secure supply chain, Instabee has become a trusted partner for online merchants and a preferred choice for consumers.

title: Scrum Master (m/f/d)
description:
**Description**
**About the Role**
 As a Scrum Master, you are responsible for facilitating agile processes and ensuring strong team flow within a design team operating in a SAFe environment. You come with a strong technical mindset and thrive in alignment, execution and delivery. You work closely with the Project Manager, Project Owner, other Scrum Masters, and design and engineering teams to enable efficient collaboration and reliable delivery.
   

  

**About The Project**
 We are engaged in a multi-year collaboration with a major vehicle manufacturer to design advanced in-vehicle digital experiences. Our work spans early R&D exploration through to production-grade design delivery, supporting several parallel development tracks and working closely with internal product and engineering teams.
   

  

**Your Tasks**
* Facilitation of agile processes and team communication
* Ensuring that team information is structured, up to date, and accurately reflected in Jira
* Supporting the on‑time delivery of planned work
* Identifying and removing impediments and blockers
* Preparing and supporting PI planning activities
* Aligning with implementation and system teams
* Actively orchestrating the end-to-end delivery of Design System assets, from concept exploration to design freeze


**Your profile**
* Several years of experience as a Scrum Master in SAFe environments
* Very strong knowledge of Jira and Confluence
* Experience working with clients and design or product teams (You can discuss technical requirements in detail with clients and dev teams)
* Strong facilitation and communication skills
* Structured, team‑oriented working style
* Excellent English; German is a plus
* Experience with complex, scaled product development or delivery programs (ideally Automotive & Mobility experience working with OEM, Tier1 or Agency/Consultancy)
* A proven track record in delivering complex HMI and Design System projects (such as Android Automotive OS, infotainment, navigation, ADAS, HMI, connected services, mobility or other future mobility services) is a must-have


**We Offer**
* Participation as a central team member of a dynamic design consultancy, self-determined and independent work with direct connection to our partners, management and colleagues
* The best team in the world :)
* Flat hierarchies and the opportunity to contribute and implement your own ideas
* A lot of personal responsibility, room for creativity and personal development, and thus the chance to grow together with the company
* hybrid-work, a dog-friendly office and meditation to promote work-life balance
* We balance work with family and private life (with a potential four day week if needed)
* Inhouse coaching and mentoring


**We are pleased to meet you!**
 We value diversity and therefore welcome all applications – regardless of gender, nationality, ethnic and social origin, religion/beliefs, disability, age, and sexual orientation and identity.
   

  

**About Us**
**Who we are**
 As an ambitious design consultancy we collaborate with our clients and see our work together as a partnership. We aim for high quality standards while staying humble. We are unconventional. Sometimes a detour is the fastest way to the goal. We are constantly striving to improve. We leave our comfort zones and grow together as a team and individuals because we support each other. And also we have a lot of fun together and give everyone the chance to contribute to our vibrant team culture. Everyone’s input is valid and appreciated.
   

  

**How We Work**
 Our interaction designers work in agile and interdisciplinary teams on websites and platforms for major brands as well as for startups. Our teams combine conceptual thinking, a sophisticated understanding of design and a deep knowledge of web and app development to develop a digital product or service with a user-centric approach. In doing so, we advise and coach our clients' teams to provide the best customer experience for their customers.
   

  

**We’re looking forward to hearing from you!**
 One more thing, never fear to apply initiative. We understand: a lack of confidence can sometimes keep us from applying for a job. But guess what?!
   

  

 There is no such thing as the perfect applicant. That's why we encourage you to apply to us.

title: Community Growth Coordinator
description:
As Community Growth Coordinator, you will be responsible for managing and growing our ambassador and creator communities across both Desenio and Poster Store. The Club App will be your central platform, while also supporting the growth of our wider organic communities across social channels. This role combines community management, creator partnerships, content creation, and analytics. You will work hands-on with creators and audiences while also helping shape how our brands build long-term engagement and loyalty organically.
   

  





 You will play an important role in supporting the growth of our global community presence across channels such as Instagram, Threads, Substack, Reddit, TikTok and other emerging platforms with a strong understanding of branding, storytelling, and audience engagement.
   

  





**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES**








* Own and manage the Desenio and Poster Store communities on the Club App platform: plan, create, and execute creator missions, campaigns, and engagement activities
* Build and nurture relationships with ambassadors, influencers, and content creators globally
* Support community management across platforms including Instagram, Threads, Substack, Reddit, TikTok, and other social channels
* Help build and strengthen organic communities outside of paid activities
* Coordinate and manage UGC collection and creator content for marketing and social use
* Analyze community growth, engagement, social performance, and creator metrics across all organic channels
* Create reports and provide strategic recommendations based on performance insights
* Stay updated on social trends, creator culture, platform developments, and community best practices



**WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR** 



* Minimum 3 years of experience within social media, marketing, community management, influencer marketing, or similar
* Proven track record of organic social growth and community building
* Comfortable working both strategically and hands-on operationally
* Analytical mindset with experience tracking KPIs, engagement metrics, audience insights, and reporting
* Skilled in content creation and experienced in Adobe Creative Suite
* Strong understanding of branding, storytelling, and social-first communication



**IT'S A PLUS IF YOU HAVE** 



* Experience working with UGC platforms or creator community platforms
* Experience within lifestyle, interior, fashion, or DTC brands
* Knowledge of influencer marketing and ambassador strategies across different markets



**AS A PERSON**




 To excel in this role you're a self-starter who thrives in a fast-paced environment and can independently lead projects and find solutions. You're curious about internet culture, social trends, creator behavior, and emerging platforms. We believe that you have excellent communication and collaboration skills and is passionate about interiors, lifestyle and digital communities.
   

  





**WHAT WE OFFER**




 We offer you a hands-on role where you'll be in contact with creators, ambassadors, and social communities while collaborating closely with cross-department teams. This is an opportunity to take ownership of a growing global community function and play an important role in shaping how our brands connect with audiences organically across the world.
   

  





 At Desenio Group you’ll be part of a young and multicultural team in the company’s beautiful office in Sockholm’s Södermalm. You’ll find the core of our brand in our office- the Art Atelier, where our in-house teams of designers, artists, and creatives develop unique art collections. With fulfillment centers in the Czech Republic and the United States, we deliver art to customers around the world. Our group consists of around 100 employees representing over 20 nationalities and together we’re solving problems every day to help the world become a more beautiful place with our affordable art.
   

  





**OTHER INFORMATION** 
  
   

  





**Start date:** 
 As soon as possible. We will begin the selection and interview process in August. Note! We do not accept applications through email.
   

  





**Extent:** 
 This is a full-time position, with an initial probation period of 6 months.    
   

  





**Location:** 
 Stockholm, Södermalm. This role is on-site.

title: Talent Management & Engagement Specialist (vikariat 18 månader)
description:
**Vill du vara med och utveckla en av världens bästa arbetsplatser?**
 På DHL Express sätter vi
 **People First** 
 . Vi tror att engagerade medarbetare, tydliga ledare och en inkluderande kultur är nyckeln till vår framgång. Nu söker vi en passionerad
 **Talent Management & Engagement Specialist.** 
 Vi är stolta över att vara Great Place to work – for all. För att fortsätta lyckas med det behöver vi fortsätta utveckla våra talanger, stärka vårt engagemang och skapa medarbetarupplevelser i toppklass.
   

  

 Nu söker vi en passionerad och driven
 **Talent Management & Engagement Specialist** 
 som vill vara med och skapa framtidens DHL Express Sverige.
   

  

**Din möjlighet att göra avtryck**
 I den här rollen får du arbeta i hjärtat av vår kultur och medarbetarupplevelse. Du kommer att driva några av våra viktigaste initiativ inom Talent Management, Engagement och Recognition – områden som direkt påverkar både våra medarbetare och verksamhetens framgång.
   

  

**Talent & Development**
 Du ansvarar för att utveckla och driva våra viktigaste talentprocesser, där du hjälper våra medarbetare och framtida ledare att nå sin fulla potential.
   

  

 Du kommer bland annat att:
   

  

  

* Äga och driva våra årliga Talent Management-processer såsom utvärderings- och utvecklingssamtal, individuella planer för personlig utveckling och successionplanering.
* Utveckla och implementera talang- och utvecklingsinitiativ som stärker vår framtida behov av kompetens.
* Vidareutveckla våra onboarding- och offboardingprocesser för att skapa fantastiska medarbetarupplevelser från första till sista dagen
* Driva ökat användande av våra utvecklingsverktyg och digitala plattformar som stöttar lärande och karriärutveckling


**Engagement & Culture**
 Hos DHL Express vet vi att engagerade medarbetare skapar fantastiska kundupplevelser.
   

  

 Därför kommer du att:
   

  

  

* Ansvara för våra medarbetarundersökningar och Great Place to Work-processen
* Analysera resultat, identifiera trender och omvandla insikter till konkreta aktiviteter som stärker engagemang och arbetsglädje
* Skapa nya lokala aktiviteter och initiativ som bygger stolthet, stärker vår kultur och firar våra framgångar
* Driva våra uppskattade Awards & Recognition-program såsom:
+ Employee of the Year & Quarter
+ Can Do Awards
+ Long Service Awards
+ Appreciation Week

* Skapa nya lokala aktiviteter och initiativ som bygger stolthet, stärker vår kultur och firar våra framgångar


**Advisory & Collaboration**
 Du blir en viktig partner till chefer och kollegor i hela organisationen.
   

  

 Du kommer att:
   

  

  

* Vara en trusted advisor inom talent-, utvecklings- och engagemangsfrågor
* Samarbeta nära vårt HR-team och verksamhetens ledare
* Representera Sverige i vårt europeiska TAME-nätverk (Talent Management & Engagement)
* Bidra med perspektiv, idéer och best practice från ett internationellt sammanhang


 Du rapporterar till vår HR Director och blir en del av ett engagerat HR-team som brinner för att skapa värde för verksamheten och våra medarbetare.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Vi tror att du är en person som får energi av att utveckla människor och organisationer.
   

  

 Du kombinerar affärsmässighet med ett genuint intresse för människor och har förmågan att både tänka strategiskt och omsätta idéer till handling.
   

  

 Du är:
   

  

  

* Relationsskapande och kommunikativ
* Strukturerad och lösningsorienterad
* Analytisk och datadriven
* Nyfiken och utvecklingsorienterad
* Självständig och initiativtagande
* Can Do-attityd


 Och kanske viktigast av allt – du tycker att framgångar ska firas och att arbetsglädje är en viktig del av en framgångsrik kultur.
   

  

**Vi tror att du har**
* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom HR eller motsvarande
* Erfarenhet av arbete inom HR med fokus på Talent Management, Learning, Engagement eller Employee Experience
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både muntligt och skriftligt
* Hög systemvana samt mycket goda kunskaper i Excel och PowerPoint
* Erfarenhet från en internationell organisation eller personalintensiv verksamhet är meriterande


**Varför DHL Express?**
 För att du får möjlighet att vara med och utveckla ett företag som redan är en av världens bästa arbetsplatser – och göra det ännu bättre.
   

  

 Hos oss får du:
   

  

  

* En nyckelroll i arbetet med att utveckla vår Great Place to Work-kultur
* Möjlighet att påverka medarbetarupplevelsen för hundratals medarbetare i Sverige
* Ett internationellt nätverk med stora utvecklingsmöjligheter
* En kultur där People First genomsyrar allt vi gör
* Fantastiska kollegor, hög energi och en stark känsla av gemenskap


**Bra att veta**
 Tjänsten är ett vikariat på 18 månader med start i september.
   

  

 Sista ansökningsdag: 3 augusti.
   

  

**Är du redo att göra skillnad på riktigt?**
 Om du vill vara med och utveckla människor, skapa engagemang och bidra till en arbetsplats där människor trivs, växer och lyckas – då vill vi gärna lära känna dig.
   

  

**Välkommen till DHL Express – där människor gör skillnad varje dag.** 
 💛❤️

title: Data Analyst
description:
**Role Summary**
 Reporting to the Analytics Manager, this is a position that requires a highly professional and organised individual.
   

  

 Main objective of the role is to provide analytical support to various departments within the organisation, with a
   

  

 strong focus on delivering data analysis and actionable insights to support stakeholders.
   

  

**Responsibilities:**
* Supporting the production of management reports
* Maintaining and improving current reporting structures
* Creating new reports either on ad hoc or regular basis
* Building automated front end tools and reports using Tableau
* Data Reconciliations
* Undertaking data analysis to support business initiatives
* Communicating findings of analysis throughout the business
* In-depth customer behaviour analytics
* Using data analysis to drive profitability of customers
* Interrogate large databases
* Other ad hoc duties required to be undertaken by the Analytics Team


**Role Requirements**
* Educated to degree level in a numerate/marketing subject or have extensive experience in a relevant discipline
* Advanced Excel skills
* Understanding of business financials, ROI & profitability
* Passion for Analytics
* Ability to present complex information in simple terms with clear recommendations based on data insight
* Strong customer focus mentality
* Ability to work in a fast-paced environment, adapt easily to changing situations and demonstrates flexibility in


 juggling priorities
   

  

* Problem solver with a can-do attitude


**Benefits**
 So what can you expect from ComeOn as a place of work?
   

  

* A competitive remuneration package inc. a company bonus scheme! 💰
* Fantastic quarterly team events and weekly company events 😎
* A one-time bonus to help you set up a comfortable workstation at home (we're truly Hybrid!)
* On top of our Hybrid work arrangement, up to 40 days a year to work fully remote from anywhere 🌎


 At ComeOn, we've embraced a Hybrid Work model, giving our employees the flexibility to work some days at home. Our offices are thoughtfully designed to support this model, featuring practical workspaces for focused efforts and collaborative zones for dynamic creative exchanges. We believe in the power of collaboration to drive innovation and success. While our offices are known for their vibrant atmosphere, rest assured that our primary focus is on achieving results together. We prioritize efficiency and maintain a balance between hard work and camaraderie. When you visit our offices, expect a warm welcome and professional support. Choose ComeOn for your next career move, and experience a workplace that values productivity, teamwork, and the spirit of collaboration.
   

  

 At ComeOn Group we value diversity and we take concrete action to ensure fairness in our recruitment process. We are committed to assess candidates on their merit without discriminating against any applicant for whatever reason that is protected by law. We truly value you, as you are.
   

  

 Want to know more about us? Just visit our website www.comeon-group.com or any of our social media channels to take a deep dive into our culture!
   

  

 LinkedIn
   

  

 Instagram
   

  

 Facebook
   

  

 Glassdoor

title: Senior Product Manager
description:
Shape how video advertising scales on the open web, where product meets commercial impact.
   

  

 Most ad budgets flow to a few closed platforms for one reason: they make it easy. Buying video on the open web should be just as easy. We are moving from a sales-led company to a product-led one, and you will help write the strategy that gets us there. This is a senior, high-agency role for someone who brings commercial instinct, product craft, and the conviction to decide what we stop doing.
   

  

**About SeenThis**
 The open web has massive untapped advertising potential, but video has historically underperformed here. SeenThis is changing that. As a video advertising partner, we prove the open web delivers exceptional results, capturing more attention with cost-effective video that keeps publishers profitable and the internet independent. Since 2017, we've served billions of streams for 5,000+ brands across 50+ countries. We believe brands deserve reach wherever audiences are, publishers deserve sustainable revenue, and the internet deserves to stay open.
   

  

 Our team of 130+ employees works globally from offices in Stockholm, Oslo, London, Paris, Singapore, Hong Kong, New York, and Sydney. We're expanding across all teams and constantly seeking new colleagues who want to make real impact in a fast-moving, collaborative environment where innovation happens daily.
   

  

 Do you want to be part of our journey, where we dare to discover, own it, and win together?
   

  

 Join SeenThis!
   

  

**About The Role**
 This is not a role where you inherit a fixed roadmap and keep it moving. You will help decide what should become a product, what should stay a service, what we should package differently, and what we should stop doing.
   

  

 SeenThis has strong commercial traction, deep customer relationships, and technology that works. The next step is turning years of bespoke campaign delivery into scalable products that brands and agencies can use at every level, from self-serve to fully managed, with our tools, services, and partner integrations running on the same core engine.
   

  

 You will lead product for a vital part of our growing suite, partnering closely with the CPTO, commercial leaders, engineers, designers, and data. You will own the outcome and the case for it: whether this is the right thing to build, whether customers adopt it, and whether it moves the business.
   

  

 Your initial focus will likely be sharpening Studio or Creative Manager into scalable product workflows. Studio is our creative production platform. Creative Manager supports the workflow from media plan to format specs to gathering creatives across many formats. As you learn the broader suite, you will help decide where product leadership should focus next.
   

  

 This is a senior individual contributor role, not a people-management one. It is high-agency and hands-on: you own a complex product area end to end. You will set direction, shape the roadmap, turn manual work into repeatable workflows, push back on bespoke work that does not scale, and broker the tradeoffs between commercial needs and product focus.
   

  

 The mandate is real and backed from the top. Decisions here weigh more than the next deal: whether something scales, serves the most customers, and helps commercial teams sell the value clearly. You will have backing, but not a blueprint.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Take the most commercially important problems, run the discovery that lowers the risk, and stay accountable for the outcome long after it ships.
* Move customer work from one-off delivery onto the product, so accounts can grow without a new round of manual effort every time.
* Shape how parts of the suite are packaged, priced, and positioned, so customers see the value, the field can sell it, and the business can scale it.
* Spend real time with customers and commercial teams, and turn what you learn into product decisions the team can act on.
* Work closely with engineering, design, and data to solve problems together, not by handing down specs.
* Find where AI can carry the load inside our products. Our workflows include many manual steps. You will decide which ones AI can draft, route, or automate, where human judgment still needs to sit, and how we measure quality so we ship features customers trust.
* Decide what we stop doing, with conviction.


**Qualifications**
* Senior product management experience in a commercial B2B environment.
* Direct exposure to pricing, packaging, monetisation, growth, go-to-market, or other commercial product decisions. This is the heart of the role.
* Commercial instinct you treat as your own problem, not someone else's. You care about willingness to pay, sales motion, segments, adoption, retention, and margin.
* A strong product toolbox: discovery, strategy, clear writing, close work with design and engineering, the right measures of success, strong launches, and learning from the market.
* Clear communication that brings people along, with strategy and tradeoffs open enough for others to challenge.
* Comfort working before the process exists. You bring structure without slowing the company down.
* Fluency using AI in your own work, from research and synthesis to prototyping and analysis. We will ask for concrete examples of how you already do this.


**Bonus If You Have Experience With**
* Building AI into a product itself, not just using it: judgment on where it should automate, where a human should stay in the loop, and whether the output is good enough to ship.
* Ad tech, martech, creative tools, media, or another commercially complex domain.
* Moving a company from service-heavy delivery to scalable product revenue.
* Building or shaping a product function early.
* Self-serve, usage-based, hybrid, or enterprise pricing.


**Application**
 As we review applications and interview on a continuous basis, please apply as soon as possible.
   

  

 Due to the high volume of applications received, we are unable to provide personalized feedback prior to the interview stage. Thank you for understanding!
   

  

**Please note:** 
 we're in our summer holiday period. Response times may be a little longer than usual, and we will get back to all candidates with feedback once the holiday period is over. Thank you for your understanding and patience!
   

  

 We conduct background checks on all SeenThis-hires to comply with our customers and protect business-critical information.
   

  

 We look forward to welcoming you to SeenThis!
   

  

 Status Quo-what? With courage and curiosity, we explore the unknown in the quest for game-changing-impact.
   

  

 To us, ownership is more than just another buzzword. It's our driving force. We own our projects and nurture them from idea to reality.
   

  

 To us, it's essential to forge deep connections both within SeenThis and with our clients. And, we approach every challenge and celebrate each success as a unified team
   

  

 The open web represents the internet's greatest untapped advertising opportunity. While 61% of consumer time happens here, across premium publishers, diverse voices, and independent content, only 29% of ad budgets follow. SeenThis is changing that.
   

  

 Our proprietary adaptive streaming technology proves the open web can outperform walled gardens, delivering 70% more attention and exceptional campaign results for brands while keeping publishers profitable and the internet independent.
   

  

 Since 2017, we've served over 40 billion impressions for 5,000+ brands across 50+ countries, partnering with agencies and publishers from eight offices worldwide.
   

  

 Brands deserve reach wherever their audiences are, publishers deserve sustainable revenue, and the internet deserves to stay open and thriving. SeenThis unlocks the open web's full potential. For more information, visit www.seenthis.co

title: Teknisk skribent
description:
*Vill du påverka och göra skillnad på riktigt? Här bidrar du till att skapa trygghet för människor och samhällen. Det du gör spelar roll.*
**Din Roll**
 Vi söker nu dig som vill jobba som teknisk skribent/informatör i en viktig verksamhet där teknik, struktur och kommunikation möts. Du kommer att skapa och uppdatera manualer, tekniskt utbildningsmaterial och teknisk dokumentation för komplexa system. Uppdraget passar dig som är både strukturerad, nyfiken och kommunikativ, och som gillar att samarbeta med olika teknikroller för att förstå helheten.
   

  

 För att lyckas i rollen behöver du ha en god förmåga och erfarenhet av att hantera dom regulatoriska kraven som gäller mot myndighet.
   

  

**Din profil**
 Vi letar efter dig med stort intresse för att skapa tydlig och användarvänlig dokumentation för avancerade tekniska produkter. Rollen är en central del i att säkerställa att komplexa system kan användas, underhållas och vidareutvecklas på ett säkert och effektivt sätt. Du ansvarar för att skapa och uppdatera dokumentation som manualer, underhållsinstruktioner, systembeskrivningar och utbildningsmaterial – alltid med fokus på tydlighet och användarvänlighet.
   

  

 Vi ser gärna att du har:
   

  

* Förmågan och intresset för att skriva tydligt och strukturerat på både svenska och engelska
* Erfarenhet av att jobba med XML, metadata, och gärna något dokumentationsverktyg


*Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.*
**Vad du blir en del av**
 Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.
   

  

 Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 28,000 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.
   

  

 Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här
   

  

 Vänligen observera att vi arbetar med löpande urval och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum har gått ut.

title: Grafisk designer
description:
Vill du vara navet i vår grafiska och kreativa produktion? Vi söker en självgående och skicklig grafisk designer som kan ta oss från brief till färdig leverans, med hög kvalitet, stark digital förståelse och känsla för både formgivning och kommersiell effekt. Som vår interna designresurs får du en viktig roll i hur våra varumärken syns, upplevs och driver resultat i digitala kampanjer, egna kanaler och säljmaterial.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som grafisk designer är du Galateas interna resurs för grafisk och kreativ produktion. Du arbetar både utifrån befintliga koncept och genom att utveckla egna visuella lösningar. En central del av rollen är att ta fram säljdrivande material för digital annonsering och egna kanaler, exempelvis nyhetsbrev, webb och sociala medier. Du producerar både statiskt och enklare rörligt/animerat material, anpassar innehåll för olika format och bidrar till att höja kvaliteten i våra digitala kampanjer. Även enklare trycksaker, säljmaterial och underlag för POS-material ingår. Du ansvarar samtidigt för struktur i produktionen, efterlevnad av grafiska profiler och utveckling av mallar och arbetssätt. Rollen innebär arbete på plats på kontoret, men med viss möjlighet till hybridarbete beroende på verksamhetens behov.
   

  

**I Ditt Ansvarsområde Ingår Bland Annat**
* Producera grafiskt material från brief till färdig leverans.
* Ta fram statiskt och enklare rörligt/animerat material för digitala kampanjer, exempelvis Meta, Google och TikTok, med förståelse för kanal, målgrupp och effekt.
* Producera material för webb, nyhetsbrev, sociala medier och andra egna kanaler.
* Ta fram säljmaterial, POS-material och tryckfärdiga original.
* Anpassa material för olika kanaler, målgrupper och format.
* Utföra enklare produktfotografering, bildbehandling och retusch.
* Äga produktionsprocessen från beställning och prioritering till genomförande, leverans och uppföljning.
* Säkerställa att varje uppdrag har en tydlig brief, rimlig tidsplan och rätt prioritet.
* Tillsammans med marknadschef följa upp produktionsvolym, kapacitetsbehov och prioriteringar löpande.
* Säkerställa att material följer grafiska profiler, kvalitetskrav, lagar och interna riktlinjer.
* Utveckla relevanta mallar, arbetsflöden och arbetssätt.


**Din profil**
 Vi söker en operativ grafisk designer med dokumenterad erfarenhet av att driva uppdrag från brief till leverans. Du har ett skarpt visuellt omdöme och förmåga att omsätta idéer till färdigt material med hög kvalitet och korta ledtider. Du trivs med att arbeta med flera parallella uppdrag, kan växla mellan digitala och tryckta format och förstår hur kommunikation behöver anpassas efter kanal, målgrupp och syfte. Du är nyfiken på AI-stödd produktion och andra moderna arbetssätt som effektiviserar den kreativa produktionen.
   

  

* Relevant utbildning och/eller motsvarande erfarenhet som grafisk designer samt några års erfarenhet av operativ grafisk produktion. Meriterande om du har erfarenhet av att arbeta i en snabbfotad produktionsmiljö.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i Adobe Creative Cloud, framför allt Photoshop, Illustrator och InDesign. Kunskap i After Effects, Premiere Pro eller motsvarande verktyg är meriterande.
* Erfarenhet av digital annonsering, sociala medier, enklare rörligt/animerat material och tryckproduktion.
* Mycket god svenska och god engelska i tal och skrift.
* Grundläggande kunskap i bildbehandling, retusch och enklare produktfotografering är meriterande.
* Erfarenhet av AI-stödd produktion och moderna digitala produktionsmetoder är meriterande.
* Erfarenhet från dryckesbranschen eller annan reglerad kategori är meriterande.


 Vänligen bifoga portfolio, arbetsprover eller annan relevant dokumentation som visar din tidigare grafiska produktion till din ansökan under övriga dokument.
   

  

**Hur går rekryteringen till?**
 Vi jobbar aktivt för mångfald och ser olikheter mellan människor som en styrka. Med målet att spegla alla våra kunder och samhället vi verkar i, söker vi människor i alla åldrar och med olika bakgrunder. I våra rekryteringar använder vi oss av personlighetstest. Det är för att kunna jämföra kandidater på ett så objektivt och rättvist sätt som möjligt. Vi gör också bakgrundskontroller. Läs mer om rekryteringsprocessen på vår hemsida.
   

  

* Sista ansökningsdag är: 16 augusti
* Tillträde: Omgående eller enligt överenskommelse
* Anställningsform: vikariat till och med 30 juni, 2027
* Sysselsättningsgrad: Heltid, 100%
* Adress: Lindhagensgatan 133, Stockholm


 Vi gör löpande urval i processen, men eftersom det är semesterperiod kommer vi att påbörja urval och återkoppling tidigast vecka 33.
   

  

 Kontakt: Vid frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta Stefan Garvander, Marknadschef stefan.garvander@galatea.se. Vid frågor om rekryteringsprocessen är du välkommen att kontakta HR-chef Selina Pettersén på selina.pettersen@galatea.se
   

  

**Varför Galatea**
 Vi är en arbetsgivare med framåtanda och där beslutsvägarna oftast är korta. Vi är en ledande dryckesleverantör och i vårt samlade utbud finns över tusen artiklar, för tusen olika smaker, för både privatkonsumenter och restaurangkunder. Med innovation, ansvarstagande och ett heltäckande sortiment är vi den utmanande kraften i dryckesbranschen .
   

  

* Stabilt och långsiktigt.  Vi är en del av Martin&Servera och har en stark och långsiktig ägare i form av familjeägda Axel Johnsson, vilket skapar både trygghet och stora utvecklingsmöjligheter.
* Utveckla branschen.  Med passion för det vi gör, i en kommersiellt driven organisation, tar vi ansvar för att utveckla varandra och vår affär. Vårt djup och bredd skapar ett unikt erbjudande till våra kunder, där du har möjlighet att påverka och bidra.
* Goda relationer.  Vi jobbar i en relationsdriven bransch. Genom öppenhet och tydliga förväntningar skapar vi goda relationer – med varandra, kunder, leverantörer och producenter. Hos Galatea blir du del av en välkomnande kultur där vi samarbetar för att driva affären framåt.


 Vi tillämpar kollektivavtal och erbjuder bland annat personalförmåner som exempelvis ett generöst friskvårdsbidrag, måltidsbidrag samt förmånsportal.
   

  

 , Tillsammans gör vi på Martin & Servera-gruppen skillnad för alla som älskar mat och dryck. Med omtanke om varandra, våra kunder och allas framtid gör vi varje dag lite godare. Och som medarbetare hos oss är du en viktig del av framgången. På Martin & Servera växer vi och utvecklas tillsammans samtidigt som alla är viktiga och får ta plats. Vi är en familjeägd koncern med över 3000 medarbetare. Här tas dina erfarenheter, idéer och kunskaper tillvara. Välkommen till oss.

title: Project Manager
description:
**Who are Benifex?** 
 💚💜
   

  

 We are a fast-moving technology company, and
 **one of the most successful providers of online reward and benefits solutions in the world.** 
 We believe that everyone deserves an exceptional experience at work, every day, and build
 **workplace technology** 
 that makes this happen. Benifex’s mission is to
 **build remarkable experiences that employees love.** 
 Today Benifex supports more than five million employees in over 3,000 organisations across more than 100 countries. To help us on our quest to be the best,
 **we need brilliant people** 
 on board and that’s where you come in. 🚀
   

  

**Why should you apply?** 
 🌟
   

  

* Own end-to-end delivery of impactful client projects
* Work at the heart of our Services function, collaborating with cross-functional delivery teams across Europe
* Build trusted client relationships and directly influence delivery success and customer satisfaction
* Develop your expertise across complex implementations, renewals, and change projects in a SaaS environment
* Be part of a fast-paced, scaling team where your contribution drives continuous improvement and delivery excellence
* Sunday Times Best Place to Work 2025 and Best Large Tech Company to Work for 2025
* Work for a profitable, fast-growing market leader in the online reward and benefits space


**Great Benefits**
 ⚖️ Guaranteed work-life balance with a hybrid working model, and a range of fantastic benefits are available
   

  

**Role Overview** 
 🚀
   

  

 As a Project Manager within our Services team, you will take ownership of the end-to-end delivery of customer projects, including implementations, renewals, and change initiatives. From initial sales handover through to go-live and aftercare, you will ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, and within budget. The role requires strong stakeholder management, structured planning, and proactive risk management, working closely with cross-functional teams to drive successful outcomes. You will play a key role in maintaining delivery quality, ensuring customer satisfaction, and supporting long-term value realisation.
   

  

**Responsibilities** 
 🤘
   

  

* Own and maintain core project documentation, including project plans, RAID logs, and status reporting
* Lead structured project planning and execution, identifying early warning signs and keeping projects on track
* Act as the primary point of contact for customers, building strong and trusted relationships
* Manage scope, timelines, risks, issues, dependencies, and escalations effectively
* Coordinate and align cross-functional delivery teams to ensure progress and accountability
* Drive delivery performance, ensuring milestones are met and outcomes are achieved
* Facilitate problem-solving with internal teams and customer stakeholders to overcome challenges
* Ensure readiness for go-live and support through hypercare phases
* Maintain clear, consistent communication across all stakeholders


**What are we looking for?** 
 🔎
   

  

* Proven experience delivering customer implementation or change projects as a Project Manager, ideally within SaaS or technology-enabled services
* Strong ability to manage multiple concurrent projects with competing priorities while maintaining quality and predictability
* Experience with delivery governance frameworks, including RAID management, milestone tracking, and change control
* Demonstrated expertise in scope and change control, managing impact on timelines, resources, and commercial outcomes
* Ability to manage dependencies across cross-functional teams such as Solution Consulting, Implementation, QA, Data Services, and Engagement Studio
* Strong stakeholder management skills, with experience building trusted relationships and influencing decision-making
* Excellent communication skills, with the ability to deliver clear updates, documentation, and presentations
* Comfortable handling escalations and driving decisions with clarity and confidence
* Highly organised, with the ability to manage multiple workstreams and maintain delivery momentum
* Hands-on experience with project management tools (e.g. Microsoft Project, Jira, Airtable, Rocketlane) and methodologies such as Agile and Waterfall
* Fluency in English


***Note: We are open to other locations for this role***
 Even if you don't meet all of the requirements for this role, we encourage you to apply! We are looking for talented and passionate individuals who are eager to learn and grow. We also offer a variety of other roles, so please check out our careers page to see if there is something else that might be a good fit for you.
   

  

**Our interview process**
 ✌ Benifex understands the need to have a fast and efficient process, the below will all be completed in the shortest time possible.
   

  

 📞 Initial informal call with the Talent team
   

  

 ⏳ Interview with the hiring manager and a member of the team
   

  

 🤩 Final interview with the Director

title: Information Manager
description:
*Vill du påverka och göra skillnad på riktigt? Här bidrar du till att skapa trygghet för människor och samhällen. Det du gör spelar roll.*
 Din roll
   

  

 Vill du vara med och skapa struktur, tydlighet och ordning i en växande organisation? Brinner du för att omsätta komplex information till smarta, säkra och användbara lösningar? Då kan du vara den Information Manager vi söker.
   

  

 Som Information Manager ansvarar du för att utveckla, förvalta och kvalitetssäkra vår informationshantering. Du blir en nyckelperson i arbetet med att skapa effektiva informationsflöden, säkra regelefterlevnad och stödja oss i vår tillväxt resa. Rollen är både strategisk och operativ – du växlar mellan att driva långsiktiga initiativ och att stödja verksamheten i det dagliga informationsarbetet.
   

  

 I rollen bidrar du också till utvecklingen av våra arbetssätt och IT-miljöer och säkerställer att verksamheten kan växa på ett tryggt och framtidssäkert sätt. Vår organisation regleras av flera regelverk, inklusive standarder för informationshantering och informationsklassificering (försvarssekretess, företagssekretess, exportkontroll). För att säkerställa efterlevnad använder vi olika IT-verktyg och nätverksmiljöer. En viktig uppgift är att leda organisationen i att inventera och strukturera tillgänglig information för att på ett effektivt sätt bidra i förändringsprojekt med fokus på säker informationshantering.
   

  

 Övergripande arbetsbeskrivning:
   

  

* Du ansvarar för helheten i vår informationshantering och agerar BA:s kontaktpunkt gentemot Saab Group och Surveillance BU:s. Du leder arbetet med att utveckla, strukturera och framtidssäkra informationsmiljön i hela affärsområdet.
* Supporterar och koordinerar med relevanta discipliner så som Informationssäkerhet.
* Du kartlägger informationsflöden och IT-miljöer och skapar förutsättningar för datadrivna arbetssätt, generativ AI och moderna utvecklingsmiljöer.
* Du identifierar förbättringsområden, fångar behov från verksamheten och driver initiativ som stärker informationsstrukturen, säkerheten och våra arbetssätt.
* Du stödjer projekt, program och team med metoder, rådgivning och utbildning inom informationshantering och informationssäkerhet, samt deltar i styrgrupper när det behövs.
* Du representerar BA:t i Process, Methods and Tools Community för Information Management och säkerställer att strategiska riktlinjer omsätts i praktiken.
* Du driver medvetenhet och kommunikation kring informationssäkerhet och informationsflöden för att skapa samsyn och förändringskraft i BA:t.


 Tjänsteort Stockholm, Göteborg eller Linköping.
   

  

 Din profil
   

  

 Vi söker en relationsbyggande ledare med god kommunikationsförmåga. Som person tror vi att du är handlingskraftig, drivs av förändring och förbättring, och sporras av tekniska utmaningar. Du är social och trivs i team, vilket gör att du effektivt kan bygga starka relationer och nätverk inom och utanför verksamheten. Integritet, lyhördhet och respekt för egna och andras expertområden är självklara egenskaper. Du har förmågan att arbeta operativt i detaljer och samtidigt hålla ett strategiskt helhetsperspektiv.
   

  

 Vi tror att du har följande kunskaper och förmågor:
   

  

* Relevant universitetsutbildning inom exempelvis IT, systemvetenskap, information management eller motsvarande arbetslivserfarenhet.
* Förståelse för IT-strukturer, systemintegration, databaser och molnlösningar
* Arbetat med informationsarkitektur och informationslivscykelhantering.
* Förmåga att strukturera, klassificera och organisera information
* Kunskap om metadata, taxonomier och ontologier
* Förmåga att se samband i komplexa strukturer och informationsflöden, både på övergripande nivå och i detaljer som påverkar helhetsbilden.
* Arbetat med rutiner för datakvalitet, spårbarhet, regelefterlevnad, riskanalyser och klassificering av information
* Grundläggande kunskap om standarder som ISO27001, ISO9001 och liknande
* Självledarskap och förmåga att organisera eget arbete
* God språkkänsla på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


 Meriterande kvalifikationer:
   

  

* Förståelse för informationsklassificering inom försvarsindustrin.
* Erfarenhet av produktutveckling inom försvarsindustrin.


 Vi lägger stor vikt vid personliga egenskaper. Passion, nyfikenhet och ett starkt intresse för informationshantering och informationssäkerhet är viktiga drivkrafter i rollen. Din motivation och engagemang för området kan väga lika mycket som formella meriter.
   

  

*Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.*
 Vad du blir en del av
   

  

 Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.
   

  

 Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 28,000 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.
   

  

 Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här
   

  

 Vänligen observera att vi arbetar med löpande urval och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum har gått ut.

title: Solution Consultant
description:
We are in Business for People, empowering people in service organizations with innovative Enterprise and Business software solutions. We’ve innovated and taken a new approach to delivering ERP that works for people. Self-driving, adaptive and intuitive software that is changing the way people work. Our solutions empower people and deliver a better people experience so people can spend time on meaningful high value work they live for.
   

  





 Read more on our website about how we transform work and how people feel about it, so our customers and their people can thrive.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

**Our job in Solution Consulting is to understand our customers’ business challenges and to accurately show how Unit4 solutions can solve these through value-driven outcomes. Whether supporting Finance, HR, Payroll, Projects or Operations teams, our focus is on helping customers achieve meaningful business results.**



* To attain the best possible solution, you will spend time researching and discovering business challenges, organizational priorities and desired outcomes. You will understand the customer, challenge their thinking and become their voice within the sales process.
* You will delight and inspire our customers by helping them shape and achieve value-driven outcomes. You are a trusted advisor who can engage confidently with stakeholders across Finance, HR and Executive leadership teams, naturally leading customers and colleagues throughout the buying journey.
* You will gradually evolve into an expert in Unit4 solutions, understanding how our portfolio supports financial management, people management, payroll, planning and operational excellence. You will be able to articulate the value of Unit4 solutions and what differentiates us in the marketplace.
* You love technology and are driven to find the best possible solutions for our customers. Your integrity, credibility and expertise set you apart from other roles in sales. Customers will trust your advice, and Unit4 Customer Success teams will believe in the vision you create during the bid stages.
* As the buying journey continually evolves, you'll be expected to produce demo recordings, digital demo content and compelling business-focused presentations tailored to different customer audiences.
* You will be involved in a wide range of activities including, but not limited to, business case support, discovery sessions, solution demonstrations, tenders and RFPs, handovers to onboarding teams, working with partners, subject matter experts and product-focused development.


**Qualifications**

 You are likely to succeed in this role if you:
   

  




* Have a relevant academic background, for example in Finance, Accounting, Economics, Human Resources, Business Administration, Industrial Engineering and Management, or another related field
* Have 3+ years of relevant professional experience in areas such as Finance, Accounting, Controlling, Payroll, HR, HCM, Workforce Management, Business Analysis, Consulting, Solution Consulting, Pre-Sales, or similar roles where you have worked closely with business processes, systems and stakeholders.
* Are comfortable preparing and delivering solution demonstrations, workshops and presentations that connect business challenges to measurable outcomes and customer value.
* Enjoy variety and change and are motivated by working across different customers, industries and sales situations.
* Have a genuine interest in business transformation, technology and value creation, and enjoy partnering closely with Account Executives to help customers understand the impact of modern Finance and HR solutions.
* Work well both independently and collaboratively and feel comfortable taking ownership while being part of a broader cross-functional team.
* Are curious, eager to learn and motivated to build expertise across areas such as Financial Management, Planning, Human Resources, Payroll and Business Operations.
* Speak fluent Swedish and English, both spoken and written.



  

  

  

  




**Additional Information**

 Join Unit4 and be part of one of the most exciting journeys in the cloud ERP software space. We’re a fast-paced, high-growth, people-centric company, delivering enterprise software for a great people experience, and offering our own people a host of benefits and development opportunities. Grow with us At Unit4, we offer:
   

  




* A culture built on trust - giving you freedom and autonomy to be successful.
* Balance - with our uncapped time off policy, remote working opportunities and Global Wellbeing Days when the whole company can switch off and prioritize well-being.
* Talented colleagues, role models and mentors - work, learn and be inspired by some of the best talent in the software industry.
* Commitment to sustainability - with initiatives such as our Act4Good program, a way for everyone at Unit4 to come together and engage in actions that benefit society and the planet.
* A safe and inclusive working environment – supported by our Employee Resource Groups, which are open to all and include Women at Unit4, Pride at Unit4, Mental Health and Access at Unit4, and People of Color at Unit4.



 Salary range: 665939 - 754167 SEK base

title: Junior Projekteringsledare
description:
**Sista ansökningsdatum:** 
 31 augusti, 2026
   

  

 Tyréns är ett av Sveriges ledande konsultföretag inom samhällsbyggnad. Vi är specialister inom stadsutveckling, arkitektur och infrastruktur som bygger samhällen som håller.
   

  

**Om tjänsten**
 Som junior projekteringsledare hos oss på Tyréns kommer du arbeta inom vårt affärsområde
 *Building & Urban Design* 
 och kompetensområde
 *P* 
*rojektledning* 
 . För att hitta mer information om vad vi gör inom detta kompetensområde klickar du här.
   

  

 I denna roll kommer du exempelvis jobba med att:
   

  

* Biträda projekteringsledaren
* Bas P - arbetsuppgifter
* Produktionsplanering


**Vi erbjuder**
 Som anställd på Tyréns erbjuder vi dig bland annat:
   

  

* Fantastiska kollegor och många specialister inom våra olika kompetensområden
* En värderingsdriven kultur där Connect, Create & Challenge är våra ledord
* Att vara del av ett stiftelseägt bolag där vinster återinvesteras i innovation, kompetens och utveckling
* En stimulerande arbetsmiljö med möjlighet att arbeta hemifrån del av din arbetstid
* Ett av de bästa företagen i branschen att ha en jämn fördelning av kvinnor och män
* Arbete i projekt tillsammans med dina Tyréns-kollegor, vi jobbar ofta i teamleveranser (sällan som enstaka resurser på plats hos våra kunder)
* Möjlighet att jobba med innovationsprojekt
* Kompetensutveckling anpassad efter dig
* Sociala aktiviteter, både på och efter ordinarie arbetstid
* Extra lediga dagar utöver dina semesterdagar
* Flertalet personalförmåner via vår förmånsportal
* Kollektivavtal med Innovationsföretagen (Almega)


 Klicka
 *här* 
 för att läsa mer om oss, vilken typ av projekt vi jobbar med, vilka utvecklingsmöjligheter som finns, våra innovationer och läsa bloggar.
   

  

**Vi söker**
 För att lyckas och trivas i rollen bör du (ha):
   

  

* Akademisk utbildning ex civil- eller högskoleingenjör/erfarenhet som kan bedömas likvärdig inom samhällsbyggnad
* 5 års erfarenhet av projekteringsledning
* Byggtekniska kunskaper inom fastighet och infrastruktur
* Erfarenhet av produktionsarbete


 Meriterande är erfarenhet/kunskap inom:
   

  

* Virutal Design and Construction (VDC)
* Produktionserfarenhet
* Praktisk erfarenhet av BAS P / BAS U
* God kunskap inom tidsplanering
* Installationssamordning/ledning


 Personliga egenskaper vi tror passar rollen och vår företagskultur:
   

  

* Social kompetens
* Lösningsorienterad
* Lyhörd
* Nyfikenhet
* Samarbetsförmåga (Laget före jaget)


 För denna tjänst ser vi att du hanterar det svenska och engelska språket i både tal och skrift för att kunna tillmötesgå våra kunder och kollegors behov.
   

  

**Ansöka**
 Du är varmt välkommen med din ansökan! Personligt brev är inte ett krav hos oss, men kommer naturligtvis läsas om det bifogas.
   

  

 Vi rekryterar löpande, så skicka gärna din ansökan redan idag då tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag.
   

  

 Med hänvisning till GDPR tar vi inte emot ansökningar per mejl utan hanterar enbart ansökningar som kommer in via ansökningslänken.
   

  

*Med anledning av sommarsemester kan återkoppling på din ansökan komma att dröja till i slutet på augusti/början på september beroende på när du ansöker.*
**Kontakt**
 Cecilia Sundberg
   

  

 Avdelningschef
   

  

 cecilia.sundberg@tyrens.se
   

  

 070 724 03 28
   

  

 Tyréns är ett av Sveriges ledande konsultföretag inom samhällsbyggnad. I samspel med kunder och partners skapar vi hållbara lösningar inom stadsutveckling och infrastruktur. Tyrénskoncernen har 3 000 medarbetare med verksamhet i Sverige, Storbritannien, Estland, Litauen, Polen, Bulgarien och Kanada. Tyréns är stiftelseägt och vår ägandeform gör det möjligt för oss att satsa målmedvetet på forskning och innovation inom samhällsbyggnadsområdet. Vi drivs av nyfikenhet och har ett nära samarbete med universitet och högskolor.

title: Service Desk Representative
description:
Join us as a Service Desk Representative at Dustin, where your contributions matter and your work creates real impact. Help customers navigate their IT challenges while developing your professional strengths.
   

  

**This is what makes the position as** 
**Service Desk Representative** 
**unique**
* Join a supportive and close-knit team where you’ll have clear opportunities to grow your career and develop new skills.
* Enjoy the flexibility of a hybrid work environment, combining the best of working from home and collaborating in the office.
* Benefit from exclusive staff discounts on the latest hardware, making cutting-edge technology more accessible.


 My name is Juuli Jokinen. I am the Team Manager Service Desk. As a leader, I am passionate about creating a supportive and trusting environment where everyone feels empowered to grow, develop their skills, and make a meaningful impact, while being part of a collaborative team that genuinely enjoys succeeding together.
   

  

**Your role & influence as** 
**Service Desk Representative**
*Responsibility* 
 : You will be given responsibility for ensuring excellent customer support by resolving technical issues, managing cases efficiently, and delivering a seamless customer experience that keeps customers satisfied.
   

  

*Collaboration* 
 : Together with your team, you take care of delivering high-quality customer support, meeting SLA commitments, and ensuring customer satisfaction. You'll work closely not only with your immediate team members but also with the Delivery, Operations, and Sales departments to provide the best possible service experience.
   

  

**Core Activities**
* Helping customers via phone and email
* Troubleshooting technical issues in collaboration with colleagues
* Managing cases according to ITIL processes


**Benefits Of Joining Dustin**
 We believe there's more to Dustin than just the benefits listed here. You'll fully understand this once you're with us. Curious? Our Life at Dustin page has you covered.
   

  

**For This Role Specific You Can Expect**
**You can find more of our benefits below in the vacancy.**
**This Is What We Imagine You Bring**
